message: chore: Remove pyproject.toml - use metal0 test instead of pytest

files.patch:
@@ -1,18 +0,0 @@
-[project]
-name = "metal0"
-version = "0.1.0"
-description = "Python-to-Zig AOT compiler"
-requires-python = ">=3.10"
-
-[project.optional-dependencies]
-dev = [
-    "pytest>=7.0.0",
-    "pytest-xdist>=3.0.0",
-]
-
-[tool.pytest.ini_options]
-testpaths = ["tests"]
-# Run tests in parallel
-addopts = "-n auto --dist loadgroup -v"
-# Timeout for compilation
-timeout = 300
